strengths: Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly demonstrating the specialized skill this role requires

concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being in the primary tech stack; prior Node.js backends centered on Express or vanilla implementations

response.justification: James is a Staff-level engineer currently at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly addressing a key job requirement that is often scarce. With 20 years of full-stack experience across multiple Staff-level roles, he significantly exceeds the 6+ year seniority requirement. His deep mastery of TypeScript, Node.js, React, and testing discipline covers the core daily work. Minor gaps (Nest.js framework, Vitest, Kotlin, Python) are easily bridgeable given his proven ability to rapidly assimilate new tools across diverse languages and architectures; his strong architectural thinking and testing culture align with role quality standards.
